sections.content: In sales, the first few moments of the call are usually the most important. First impressions are usually not the last impressions, but sometimes you don’t get a second chance. In sales, grooming and attire are an important part of creating the right first impression. Looking the part is integral to your personal and organizational branding. Skillsbucket’s Grooming for Sales is a one day practical workshop, that includes all the nuances of grooming and attire required to look confident and create fantastic first impressions, which could lead to better closing.

content: Understand why first impressions are important
Avoid faux pas of grooming and dressing
Understand the grooming etiquette and personal hygiene
Learn the art of wearing the right colour palette and power dressing for various situations
